name: proc_creation_win_wusa_susp_parent_execution
raw_query: any where process.executable:"*\\wusa.exe" and ((process.parent.executable like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\Appdata\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*")) or ((process.parent.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.parent.executable:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.parent.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.parent.executable:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.parent.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.parent.executable:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (process.parent.executable:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.parent.executable:"*\\Pictures\\*"))) and (not process.command_line:"*.msu*")
